title: onobrychis aequidentata
intro: Onobrychis aequidentata, also known as the aspera or green bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Onobrychis aequidentata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or taken as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
